title: Endpoint liveness
headline: Pilot of 300 distinct FHIR-REST hosts: 96.7% answered HTTP, 91.7% served a parseable CapabilityStatement at /metadata, 86.7% published a valid .well-known/smart-configuration. Across all 5.0M NPD endpoints, 74.19% declare FHIR-REST and 25.81% declare Direct. 98.69% of Organizations carry zero Endpoint references.
notes: H1-H3 results from 300-host pilot sample (1 endpoint per host, stratified by host-fingerprint). Full FHIR-REST crawl spans 2,974 distinct hosts; results here are preliminary. Highest level reached on pilot: {7: 280, -1: 7, 3: 8, 0: 3, 5: 1, 6: 1}. FHIR version top declarations: {'4.0.1': 165, '4.0.0': 110}. H4 and H5 computed over the full population in BigQuery: H4 5,043,524 endpoints (3,741,547 FHIR-REST, 1,301,977 Direct); H5 3,603,262 orgs of which 3,556,049 have no managingOrganization reference from any Endpoint.
